credits: Egyrn and Pax Rulin subsectors of Trojan Reach sector were designed by Bob McWilliams and appear in Traveller Adventure 4: Leviathan (GDW, 1980). The rest of Trojan Reach sector was designed by Marc W. Miller and appears in Atlas of the Imperium (GDW, 1984). The remaining subsectors were refined by Mike Jackson and appear in Third Imperium Magazine (1986-1988) and The MegaTraveller Journal #3 (Digest Group Publications, 1992).
